anomalies.description: Sudden 90% drop in death benefit value
anomalies.recommendation: Investigate policy adjustment or potential data entry error
Review rider charges and policy amendments
Verify payment method and contact policyholder

--- Document 1 ---

Tarun Khatri
+91 7775094760 | ttkhatri559@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/tarun-khatri | Gurugram, India
Professional Summary
Technical Project Manager with 5+ years managing complex technology projects in fintech and financial services. Expert in Agile
methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, SAFe) with proven ability to deliver projects using Waterfall and hybrid approaches. Strong
experience managing matrixed teams, coordinating multiple initiatives, and delivering according to Service Level Agreements. Skilled
in full software development lifecycle, third-party system integrations, and managing conversions and implementations. Demonstrated
ability to manage project scope, schedule, costs, and risks while communicating effectively with stakeholders. Experience mentoring
junior project managers, driving results in cross-functional teams, and leading change management initiatives. Comfortable working
evening shifts (4:30 PM - 2:00 AM IST) with US-based teams.
Professional Experience
Technical Project Manager
Aug. 2023 - Present
Whuups (Fintech Platform - Payment & Financial Services) Remote
- Managed delivery of fintech payment platform projects coordinating 3 matrixed teams (engineering, product, operations) and
external client integrations delivering according to Service Level Agreements with 95% on-time completion rate
- Managed changes to project scope, schedule, and costs tracking 24 major releases over 18 months maintaining project baseline,
processing 40+ change requests, and ensuring stakeholder alignment through structured change control processes
- Communicated project expectations and status updates to stakeholders conducting weekly status meetings, monthly steering
committee reviews, and ad-hoc executive briefings ensuring alignment between project team and business objectives
- Measured project performance using Earned Value Management identifying schedule variances, cost variances, and quality metrics,
performing corrective actions that improved delivery predictability from 75% to 95%
- Created project organization structure defining roles and responsibilities for 10+ team members including developers, QA engineers,
business analysts, and operations staff establishing clear accountability and decision-making authority
- Identified and mitigated project risks maintaining risk register with 50+ identified risks, conducting risk assessments, implementing
mitigation strategies, and escalating critical risks reducing project impact from high to medium severity
- Recorded detailed customer requirements using requirements-gathering techniques including planning sessions with stakeholders,
brainstorming workshops, focus groups with end users, and structured interviews documenting 100+ functional and non-functional
requirements
- Improved team performance leading daily standups, sprint planning, retrospectives, mentoring 3 junior project managers, conducting
training sessions on Agile practices, and building team cohesiveness achieving 40% velocity improvement
- Managed projects using Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) serving as Scrum Master facilitating ceremonies, removing
impediments, coaching team on Agile principles, and maintaining burndown charts and velocity metrics
- Demonstrated understanding of project lifecycle in complex technical environment managing full software development lifecycle from
requirements gathering through design, development, testing, deployment, and post-production support
Project Manager - Technology Implementation
Jan. 2021 - Jul. 2023
Honcho Metrics (Technology Consulting - Financial Services) Remote
- Managed delivery of 15+ technology implementation projects for financial services clients coordinating cross-functional teams,
managing third-party vendor relationships, and delivering solutions within budget and timeline constraints
- Executed tasks as defined in project plan using Microsoft Project, Jira, and Smartsheet tracking task dependencies, resource
allocation, milestone completion, and critical path analysis ensuring project delivery according to schedule
- Communicated with stakeholders across multiple time zones including evening shifts working with US-based teams establishing
strong rapport through regular communication, transparent reporting, and proactive issue resolution
- Managed conversions and implementations coordinating data migration, system cutover, user acceptance testing, training delivery,
and go-live support for 8 successful platform transitions with zero critical post-launch defects
- Participated in full software development lifecycle managing requirements analysis, design reviews, development sprints, quality
assurance, deployment planning, and production support ensuring end-to-end project visibility
- Managed third-party system integrations coordinating with external vendors, reviewing technical specifications, monitoring
integration testing, and ensuring compliance with Service Level Agreements achieving 99% integration success rate
- Applied variety of project methodologies using Waterfall for infrastructure projects, Scrum for product development, and Kanban for
support operations selecting appropriate methodology based on project characteristics and stakeholder preferences
- Used project management tools including Microsoft PowerPoint for stakeholder presentations, Excel for budget tracking, Visio for
process mapping, SharePoint for document management, and Jira for Agile project tracking
- Demonstrated problem-solving and analytical skills identifying project bottlenecks, analyzing root causes, developing solutions, and
implementing corrective actions that reduced average issue resolution time by 60%
